# Pull Request

请保持变更范围聚焦，并填写适用的部分。

Please keep the change focused and fill in the sections that apply.

## 关联 Issue / Related Issue

<!-- Closes #123 / Fixes #123 / Related #123。没有 Issue 时请说明需求来源。 -->
<!-- If there is no issue, explain where the request came from. -->

## 变更摘要 / Summary

<!-- 用 2 到 5 条 bullet 说明改了什么。 -->
<!-- Use 2 to 5 bullets to describe what changed. -->

## 验证 / Validation

<!-- 写清楚命令、设备/控制器、资源包和结果。不要只写“已测试”。 -->
<!-- List exact commands, devices/controllers, resource packs, and results. Do not write only "tested". -->

- [ ] `pnpm check`

## 影响范围 / Impact

<!-- 说明受影响的任务、pipeline、资源、release workflow、文档或生成文件。 -->
<!-- Mention affected tasks, pipelines, resources, release workflow, docs, or generated project files. -->

## 截图 / 日志 / 说明 / Screenshots / Logs / Notes

<!-- 涉及识别、点击、界面、工作流或 Bug 修复时，请提供截图、ROI、模板路径、日志、Actions 链接或复现步骤。 -->
<!-- For recognition, touch, UI, workflow, or bug fixes, include screenshots, ROI, template paths, logs, Actions links, or reproduction steps. -->

## 检查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 我已阅读并遵守 `CONTRIBUTING.md` / I have read and followed `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] PR 范围清晰，没有混入无关格式化或重构 / The PR has one clear scope and does not include unrelated formatting or refactors.
- [ ] 用户可见行为或流程变化已同步文档 / User-visible behavior or workflow changes are documented.
- [ ] 我没有提交本地缓存、构建产物、调试文件、下载的 runtime 文件或大体积模型文件 / I did not commit local caches, build outputs, debug files, downloaded runtime files, or large model files.
